atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling depressed

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing severe pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing bleeding

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports constipation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports weight loss

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies vomiting

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes oral hormone replacement therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of endometriosis

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no family history of gynecological cancers

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a three centimeter left ovarian mass

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals associated localized lymph node involvement

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals slight tenderness to palpation of the left lower quadrant

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Abdominal CT shows no evidence of gross peritoneal or metastatic disease

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is most likely diagnosed with stage three ovarian cancer

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders blood tests including CA-125, HCG, AFP, and LDH.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends genetic counseling and testing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hysterectomy with bilateral oophorectomy and lymph node dissection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends adjuvant chemotherapy with cisplatin and taxol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician considers intraperitoneal chemotherapy if appropriate based on surgical findings.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a pathology review of all specimens.
